query:
SELECT e.id, e.user_id, e.course_id, c.title as courseTitle, u.email 
FROM enrollments e 
JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id 
JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id 
WHERE u.email = 'student@test.com'

FROM enrollments e
